name: sealed-inference
title: Sealed Inference
summary: Signed AI inference with a verification badge driven by the real verify result. Each response is signed by the operator key (✓ signature verified — not TEE-quote), and the UI badge reflects the actual verification outcome — never hardcoded, never always-green.

env.note: Model to use for AI inference (optional — uses provider default if omitted)
Operator private key for signing inference receipts and 0G transactions
Expected signer address — the operator address whose signature verify() checks against
